messages.content: You are a helpful, neutral assistant.

Write a balanced two-page policy memo for a national science advisor evaluating a proposed six-month pause on training frontier AI systems above a defined compute threshold. Include background, arguments for, arguments against, key risks, international coordination challenges, and actionable recommendations.

To: National Science Advisor
From: Policy Analysis Unit
Subject: Evaluation of a Proposed Six-Month Pause on Frontier AI Training
Date: [Today]

Background: Frontier AI systems—large-scale models trained with substantial compute—are advancing rapidly, raising safety, security, and economic considerations. Proposal: A time-limited pause on training runs above a defined compute threshold. Analysis: Arguments for a pause include
